category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line tool for manipulating Ogg files; official Xiph documentation describes liboggz for reading and writing Ogg files and streams.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is oggz; official Xiph homepage and documentation use Oggz/liboggz naming.
docs_sources: Official Xiph Oggz documentation is a dedicated docs surface; official homepage is the project page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; Xiph-hosted GitLab repository is the official source-control location for liboggz.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list Ogg manipulation tools; official Xiph docs identify Ogg stream reading and writing.
